entries.title: Cursed Energy Comes From Negative Emotion

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline, including Jujutsu Kaisen 0 as prequel context and main series chapters 1-271.

content.fact: Cursed energy is generated from negative human emotion and is the baseline fuel for jujutsu techniques, curse reinforcement, barriers, and many supernatural effects in Jujutsu Kaisen.
content.injection: When a scene uses the JJK power system, treat cursed energy as emotion-derived supernatural fuel. Do not write it as generic mana, science, or harmless aura.
constraints: Keep the explanation compact unless the scene is explicitly about training or technique mechanics.
antiLore: Do not let ordinary non-sorcerers understand cursed energy mechanics without a scene-specific reason.

sourceInfo.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline, including Jujutsu Kaisen 0 as prequel context and main series chapters 1-271.

content.fact: Many sorcerer abilities are innate cursed techniques with personal rules, inherited traits, or user-specific conditions rather than freely interchangeable spell lists.
content.injection: When writing sorcerer abilities, keep cursed techniques specific to the user and their established rules. Do not hand out unrelated techniques casually.
constraints: Use separate arc or character Lorecards for exact technique reveals, mastery changes, and special exceptions.
antiLore: Do not treat every trained sorcerer as able to learn any named technique.

sourceInfo.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline, including Jujutsu Kaisen 0 as prequel context and main series chapters 1-271.

content.fact: Domain Expansion is an advanced cursed technique expression that imposes a constructed domain and usually changes combat through sure-hit or domain-specific rules.
content.injection: Treat Domain Expansion as a major escalation with battlefield rules, counters, and severe tactical consequences. Do not use it as a casual visual flourish.
constraints: Exact domains, counters, and exceptions belong in character or arc decks.
antiLore: Do not make every sorcerer domain-capable.

sourceInfo.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Binding Vows Trade Limits For Power

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline, including Jujutsu Kaisen 0 as prequel context and main series chapters 1-271.

content.fact: Binding Vows are binding restrictions, exchanges, or promises that can shape cursed energy outcomes and punish broken terms.
content.injection: Use Binding Vows as consequential tradeoffs. A vow should create a real condition, cost, or restriction rather than free power.
constraints: Keep vow effects tied to the stated condition and scene Context.
antiLore: Do not use Binding Vows as unlimited loopholes.

sourceInfo.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Cursed Tool Grade Depends On Function
